summary: Iteration 3 verifies the recruiter-focused redesign. Backend: 8/8 pytest passing (profile shape with value_prop/impact_metrics(4)/why_hire_me(3)/dicebear avatar, experience[0]=Practo Business Analyst Intern current:true, /api/track ok+400, /api/analytics 403 on bad token / 200 with expected keys, /api/contact success incl email_sent + 400 on missing field). Frontend (Playwright on public URL): hero heading 'Data. Decisions. Delivered.' verified (no giant HI I'M ABHISHEK), avatar src contains 'dicebear', NO marquee/services sections and no 'motionsites' references, WhyHireMe section has 3 cards (why-item-0/1/2 with correct titles), Work section has exactly the 3 case-studies case-practo/case-inlighn/case-nl-analytics each rendering Problem/Action/Result blocks and stack chips, impact-strip has 4 impact-0..3, Skills section uses chip pills (0 progressbars), default theme = light and theme-toggle switches to dark, Contact form submits and shows 'Message sent — email delivered to Abhishek!' toast (Resend working). No code changes made per instruction.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~550 lines with static PROFILE/EXPERIENCE/SKILLS/CERTIFICATIONS data — consider extracting to /app/backend/data.py to keep server.py focused on routing.
App.js is ~570 lines and holds every section — split into /components (Hero, Work, WhyHireMe, Contact, etc.) for maintainability.
/api/track has no rate-limiting or origin check — trivially spammable and will inflate analytics; add basic IP-based throttling or an HMAC nonce.
ANALYTICS_TOKEN passed via query string — will appear in server access logs / referrer headers. Prefer an Authorization header.
useMemo imported in App.js but unused — minor dead import.
seed_data_creation: Test track events with prefix TEST_ inserted into portfolio_events; one TEST_ contact message inserted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesign fully verified. All required data-testids exist (hero-heading, hero-avatar, why-hire-me-section, why-item-0/1/2, work-section, case-practo/case-inlighn/case-nl-analytics, impact-strip, impact-0..3, skills-section, theme-toggle, contact-form). Default theme is LIGHT via localStorage. Analytics token in backend/.env: r_0CJIn7mLmAxRaLU9dBlYYHp4yADitI. Resend email actually delivers (email_sent:true observed).
